1.ph.4   Hello! and welcome to [sin]Sliceymon+[sin]![nh]   The original Sliceymon was created by [white]Berder[cu] and [white]Leonard Curry[cu] - all credit to them for the incredible foundation.[nh]   This expanded version by [sin][orange]hgore[cu][sin] adds [sin]21[sin] new hero lines[comma] new Gen 3/4/5 bosses[comma] new monsters[comma] new captures[comma] and more![nh]   [grey]P.S. If these messages annoy you just delete the message and credit modifiers at the start of the list.mn.Message from hgore,

1.ph.4   [white]Original Sliceymon[cu] by Berder and Leonard Curry[nh]   [white]Sliceymon+[cu] expansion by hgore[nh][nh]   Thank you to Berder and Curry for the amazing base mod[comma] to Kas[comma] Thunder[comma] and Punpun for tutorials[comma] and to the #textmod-help community.[nh]   New in Sliceymon+: Starters from Gen 1-3[comma] Nidorans[comma] Pikachu[comma] Machamp[comma] Lucario[comma] Dragonite[comma] and many more![nh]                  - hgore.mn.Message from hgore 2,

1.ph.4         Credits[monster grin][nh][white]Original Sliceymon[cu][nh]Berder and Leonard Curry[nh][white]Sliceymon+ Expansion[cu][nh]hgore[nh][white]Art[cu][nh]Pmdcollab.org[comma] Wholewheatdough[comma] Curry[comma] Berder[nh][white]Other[cu][nh]Gamefreak[grey] (Obviously)[cu][comma] the Slice and Dice textmod community[comma] Kas[comma] Thunder[comma] Punpun[comma] CranberryGod[comma] and everyone who played Sliceymon[nh]Catch you later![nh]       -hgore[comma] Berder[comma] and Curry.mn.Credits,
